# files_user_additional_email_recipient (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "files_user_additional_email_recipient" "example_user_additional_email_recipient" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) User additional email recipient ID

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Created at date/time
- `email` (String) Additional email recipient address
- `user_id` (Number) User ID
- `workspace_id` (Number) Workspace ID (0 for default workspace).
